THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNARD, STEVE BERNARD, TERRI AKA TERRI JACKSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1217 DIVISADERO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $2,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E TO 6AM 5-31-95. NO FURTHER STAYS OR APPEALS. SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED TO PLTFF. ANY PROPERTY LEFT BY DEFTS WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE & WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM THIS ACTION EXCEPT IN CASE OF BREACH BY DEFTS.
DEPT 07. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER:M.NORMAN. CLERK:G.SHULL C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PREPARED STIPULATED JUDGMENT SUBMITTED BY PLTFF.
